ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., R, PG) */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie (e.g., Drama, Action) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "released" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "score" REAL /* Average score of the movie */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer of the movie */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* ID of the star of the movie */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "gross" INTEGER /* Gross revenue of the movie */,
  "company" TEXT /* Production company of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the director (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the writer */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the writer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the star */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the star */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the star */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the star (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the star in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member in the movie (e.g., director, writer, producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., watched, rated, reviewed) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "movie_id", "timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Picture, Best Director) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
